title: National Trucking Strike
description: Truckers strike over new regulations, blocking major highways.

C.title: Deploy security forces to clear roads

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Clearing roads by force violates civil liberties. Heavy-handed responses inflame tensions.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Allowing blockades cripples the nation. Security forces restore order.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Both extremes hurt the economy. Negotiation keeps goods moving.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Negotiation respects rights. Force destroys trust.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Trust doesn’t matter if highways stay blocked.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: And force doesn’t matter if the economy collapses from prolonged disruption.
